name: Ovo: Veggie Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onion until soft.
2. Mix all ingredients except the flour and leave to cool.
3. Form the mixture into patties and brown in a skillet.
Recipe notes:
This recipe comes from "New Recipes for Young Vegetarians" by Sammy Green. Lentils take about one hour to cook from dry, but they freeze well, so make a large batch at once. This recipe was crumbly, which might have been due to it being the first time made. For a vegan version, refer to "The Moosewood Cookbook" by Mollie Katzen on page 147.
